title: fix(deployer): bump esbuild from ^0.25.10 to ^0.27.3
summary: Bumps esbuild dependency in @mastra/deployer from ^0.25.10 to ^0.27.3 to address Go stdlib CVEs (CVE-2025-22871, CVE-2025-61729) flagged by npm audit. The change is minimal: one version bump in package.json and a proper changeset file. Note that esbuild uses 0.x semver where ^0.25.x only resolves within 0.25.x, so this is effectively a major version jump (0.25 -> 0.27) that could have breaking changes in esbuild's API or output.
maintainerNotes: Clean, well-scoped security bump from an external contributor. Includes a changeset with clear rationale. CI tests are stuck in PENDING state — likely because the workflow requires secrets authorization for external contributor forks. Vercel preview deploys also fail for the same reason. A maintainer needs to: (1) verify esbuild 0.27.x is compatible with the deployer's usage (since ^0.x bumps are effectively breaking in npm semver), (2) approve the CI workflow to run, and (3) review. The current main branch still has ^0.25.10 so this is not superseded.
